TextArea

Multi-line text input for longer form content using <textarea> Slyte DOM. States: Empty, Filled, Focus, Disabled, Error, Success, Resizable, With Counter.

Form Figma Synced 10 States × 1 Size
Default — Empty
Base
Optional helper text
HTML
<div class="zc-textarea-field">
  <label class="zc-textarea-label">Description</label>
  <div class="zc-textarea-wrapper">
    <textarea class="zc-textarea" placeholder="Enter text..." rows="3"></textarea>
  </div>
  <div class="zc-textarea-footer">
    <span class="zc-textarea-hint">Optional helper text</span>
  </div>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-textarea-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.zc-textarea-wrapper {
  border: 1px solid var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #D5D6D9);
  border-radius: var(--zc-radius-r, 6px);
  background: var(--zc-color-black-white-surface-white-surface, #FFFFFF);
}
.zc-textarea {
  min-height: 80px; padding: 8px 12px;
  font-size: var(--zc-p2-font-size, 14px);
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-default, #37383C);
}
Default — Without Helper Text
No Hint
HTML
<div class="zc-textarea-field">
  <label class="zc-textarea-label">Comments</label>
  <div class="zc-textarea-wrapper">
    <textarea class="zc-textarea" placeholder="Add your comments here..." rows="3"></textarea>
  </div>
</div>
Filled — Multi-line Content
Filled
Helper text goes here
HTML
<div class="zc-textarea-field">
  <label class="zc-textarea-label">Description</label>
  <div class="zc-textarea-wrapper">
    <textarea class="zc-textarea" rows="4">Your content here...</textarea>
  </div>
  <div class="zc-textarea-footer">
    <span class="zc-textarea-hint">Helper text goes here</span>
  </div>
</div>
Focus — Blue Border + Shadow
Focus
This textarea is focused
HTML
<div class="zc-textarea-field">
  <label class="zc-textarea-label">Notes</label>
  <div class="zc-textarea-wrapper zc-textarea-wrapper-focus">
    <textarea class="zc-textarea" rows="3" placeholder="Start typing..."></textarea>
  </div>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-textarea-wrapper-focus,
.zc-textarea-wrapper:focus-within {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-primary-border-primary-border-default, #0D4EF2);
  box-shadow: 0px 2px 2px 0px rgba(13, 78, 242, 0.05), 0px 2px 4px 0px rgba(13, 78, 242, 0.08);
}
Disabled — Non-interactive
Disabled Empty
This field is disabled
Disabled Filled
HTML
<div class="zc-textarea-field">
  <label class="zc-textarea-label">Address</label>
  <div class="zc-textarea-wrapper zc-textarea-wrapper-disabled">
    <textarea class="zc-textarea" rows="3" disabled>123 Main Street...</textarea>
  </div>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-textarea-wrapper-disabled {
  background: var(--zc-color-neutral-surface-neutral-surface-disabled, #F5F5F5);
  cursor: not-allowed;
}
.zc-textarea-wrapper-disabled .zc-textarea {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  color: #9EA0A7;
  resize: none;
}
Error — Validation Failed
Error Empty
This field is required
Error Filled
Minimum 50 characters required
HTML
<div class="zc-textarea-field zc-textarea-field-error">
  <label class="zc-textarea-label">Bio</label>
  <div class="zc-textarea-wrapper zc-textarea-wrapper-error">
    <textarea class="zc-textarea" rows="3"></textarea>
  </div>
  <div class="zc-textarea-footer">
    <span class="zc-textarea-hint">This field is required</span>
  </div>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-textarea-wrapper-error {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-error-border-error-border-default, #CC1914);
  background: var(--zc-color-error-surface-error-surface-subtle, #FEF6F6);
}
.zc-textarea-field-error .zc-textarea-hint {
  color: var(--zc-color-error-text-error-text-default, #CC1914);
}
Success — Validated
Success
Looks good!
HTML
<div class="zc-textarea-field">
  <label class="zc-textarea-label">Feedback</label>
  <div class="zc-textarea-wrapper zc-textarea-wrapper-success">
    <textarea class="zc-textarea" rows="3">Your feedback...</textarea>
  </div>
  <div class="zc-textarea-footer">
    <span class="zc-textarea-hint" style="color: #078841;">Looks good!</span>
  </div>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-textarea-wrapper-success {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-success-border-success-border-default, #078841);
}
Resizable — User Can Drag to Resize
Vertical Resize
Drag the corner to resize vertically
Both Directions
Resize in both directions
No Resize
Resize is disabled
HTML
<!-- Vertical resize (default) -->
<textarea class="zc-textarea" style="resize: vertical;"></textarea>

<!-- Both directions -->
<textarea class="zc-textarea" style="resize: both;"></textarea>

<!-- No resize -->
<textarea class="zc-textarea zc-textarea-noresize" style="resize: none;"></textarea>
SCSS
.zc-textarea { resize: vertical; }                  /* default */
.zc-textarea-noresize .zc-textarea { resize: none; } /* disabled */
With Counter — Character Limit
Empty Counter
Keep it brief 0/200
Partial Counter
62/200
Near Limit
Character limit almost reached 192/200
HTML
<div class="zc-textarea-field">
  <label class="zc-textarea-label">Short Bio</label>
  <div class="zc-textarea-wrapper">
    <textarea class="zc-textarea" placeholder="Write a short bio..."
      rows="3" maxlength="200"></textarea>
  </div>
  <div class="zc-textarea-footer">
    <span class="zc-textarea-hint">Keep it brief</span>
    <span class="zc-textarea-counter">0/200</span>
  </div>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-textarea-footer {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  margin-top: 4px;
}
.zc-textarea-counter {
  font-size: var(--zc-p3-font-size, 12px);
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-subtle, #9EA0A7);
  margin-left: auto;
}
